zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Warrene於1286年6月30日出生在英國素可時，他的父親William de Warenne30歲，母親Joan de Vere32歲。他於1306年5月25日與Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特結婚。他於1347年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布洛姆費爾德被列為lord of bromfield and yale。他去世於1347年6月30日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯列維斯 聖 多馬 亞特 克利夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Warrene于1286年6月30日出生在英国素可时，他的父亲William de Warenne30岁，母亲Joan de Vere32岁。他于1306年5月25日与Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特结婚。他于1347年在英国英格兰史洛普爾布洛姆費爾德被列为lord of bromfield and yale。他去世于1347年6月30日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯列維斯 聖 多馬 亞特 克利夫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warrene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Warren
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Warrene was born on 30 June 1286, in Sussex, England, his father, William de Warenne, was 30 and his mother, Joan de Vere, was 32. He married Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey on 25 May 1306, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England. In 1347, at the age of 61, his occupation is listed as lord of bromfield and yale in Bromfield, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 30 June 1347, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Warrene est né le 30 juin 1286, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan de Vere, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey le 25 mai 1306, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. En 1347, à l’âge de 61 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord of bromfield and yale à Bromfield, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1347, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Warrene am 30. Juni 1286 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Warenne 30 und seine Mutter Joan de Vere 32. Er hat am 25. Mai 1306 in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey geheiratet. 1347, als er 61 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord of bromfield and yale in Bromfield, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Juni 1347 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Warrene è nato il il 30 giugno 1286 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, William de Warenne, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Vere, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey il 25 maggio 1306, nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Nel 1347, all'età di 61 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord of bromfield and yale nel Bromfield, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 30 giugno 1347, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスター
ja.lifeSummary: John de Warreneが1286年6月30日にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父William de Warenneは30歳，母Joan de Vereは32歳であった。1306年5月25日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターでJoan de Bar Countess of Surreyと結婚した。1347年，61歳の時，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブロムフィールドでの職業はlord of bromfield and yaleと記録されている。彼は1347年6月30日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスルス スト ソマス アト クリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Warrene(이)가 1286년 6월 30일 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Warenne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Vere(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1306년 5월 25일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey(와)과 결혼했다. 1347년, 61세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브롬필드에서 lord of bromfield and yale이었다. 그는 1347년 6월 30일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스 루스 스트 톰아스 앳 클리프에 묻혔다.

pt.30 June 1286–30 June 1347: 30 de junho de 1286–30 de junho de 1347
pt.Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex: Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra
pt.Poynton with Worth, Cheshire, England, U: Poynton with Worth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Warrene nasceu em 30 de junho de 1286, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Vere, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey em 25 de maio de 1306, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Em 1347, com 61 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord of bromfield and yale em Bromfield, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1347, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Poynton with Worth, Cheshire, England, U: поинтон вит ворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Warrene родился 30 июня 1286 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Warenne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Vere, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey 25 мая 1306 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. В 1347 году, в возрасте 61 год,  он работал по профессии lord of bromfield and yale в местности бромфиелд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 30 июня 1347 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности львесь ст томас ат клифф, львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Warrene nació el 30 de junio de 1286, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Warenne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan de Vere, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan de Bar Countess of Surrey el 25 de mayo de 1306, en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. En 1347, a la edad de 61 años, su ocupación registrada era lord of bromfield and yale en Bromfield, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 30 de junio de 1347, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
